rationale: BSON spec: driver doesn't check string length before slice in CodeWithScope, causing panic on invalid BSON.
Adding RetryableWriteError labels to retryable transaction test files; child of DRIVERS-826 test update.
Separating BulkWrite tests by operation; child of DRIVERS-827, test infrastructure improvement.
Transactions spec requires UnknownTransactionCommitResult label for writeConcernErrors not code 79/100; driver missing this.
CRUD spec (DRIVERS-790) requires error when hint used with unacknowledged update; improvement to implement spec requirement.
Infinite recursion in struct decoder with mgocompat registry; Go-specific implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
SRV polling not performed when URI not passed to topology; DNS seedlist spec requires SRV polling for mongos discovery.
Improvement to add speculative authentication in isMaster (DRIVERS-918); proactive spec-rollout work, not a nonconformance bug.
Server selection spec: read preference must not be sent to mongos for aggregation with $out/$merge output stages; driver does it unconditionally.
Improvement to use whitelist for change stream resumability (DRIVERS-907); proactive spec-rollout improvement, not existing nonconformance.
Extended JSON spec: lone $scope key must error; driver parses without error and panics on certain input.
Code quality improvement: unreachable code and confusing error message in loadCert; internal refactor, no spec rule involved.
Allowing invalid UTF-8 strings to decode; Go-specific ergonomics decision, BSON spec doesn't mandate rejecting invalid UTF-8 strings.
Extended JSON spec: extra keys adjacent to $code must error; driver either produces wrong error or silently drops code value.
Extended JSON spec: $timestamp fields must be restricted to uint32; driver accepts values exceeding uint32 without error.
RetryableWrites spec improvements (DRIVERS-919); proactive spec rollout improvement, not existing wrong behavior.
Internal refactor to remove bsonx dependency and use bsoncore; no behavior change, no spec rule involved.
Extended JSON spec: top-level keys like $undefined must not be treated as extended JSON; driver incorrectly interprets and errors.
Adding hint support for delete command (DRIVERS-908); new spec feature implementation, driver not doing anything wrong previously.
JSON spec: single-quote is not a legal escape character; driver accepts \' without error, violating the JSON specification.
Removing ElectionInProgress from ResumableChangeStreamError per DRIVERS-973 spec update; proactive spec rollout, not existing wrong behavior.
Propagating WriteConcernError errInfo (DRIVERS-967); new spec requirement, not existing nonconformance.
Sessions spec: endSessions batching must have BSON array indexes starting from 0; driver reuses stale indexes causing server error.
Deadlock in connection.wait() causing queries to hang indefinitely; internal concurrency bug, no specific spec rule violated.
API ergonomics: expose filename/metadata in GridFS DownloadStream; convenience improvement, not a spec conformance issue.
Server selection spec: empty tag set [{}] must match all candidate servers; driver only matches servers with explicitly empty tag set.
API ergonomics: exposing GridFS files and chunks collections as public fields; convenience improvement, not spec conformance.
Internal optimization: removing timeout check from server selection fast path; implementation change, no spec rule violated.
Allowing BSON undefined to decode to Go types for ADL compatibility; ergonomics improvement, not a spec rule requirement.
Updating Evergreen CI config to use new OCSP mock responder requirements file; CI/test infrastructure change.
Bulk writes not transforming internal ErrUnacknowledgedWrite to public API error type; internal API wrapping bug, no spec rule.
Map key encoding uses fmt.Sprint/Stringer; Go-specific ergonomics issue with no specific BSON spec rule about key encoding strategy.
User support question: DNS lookup error connecting to MongoDB Atlas; not a spec conformance issue.
User support question about struct embedding decode behavior; resolution 'Done' (not Fixed) indicates not a driver bug.
Documentation improvement for SetCompressors; docs-only change, no spec behavior involved.
Default connection idleTimeout 10min vs documented unlimited; CMAP spec doesn't mandate unlimited default, this is a docs/config discrepancy.
CRUD spec: InsertMany must only return IDs of successfully inserted documents; driver returns IDs even for failed insertions.
Updating FLE test setup to avoid admin database (DRIVERS-1194); test infrastructure fix, not driver behavior issue.
Handshake spec requires appname in client metadata; driver's server.cfg.appname never set, so isMaster omits application name.
Defensive check: set c.nc only if dial succeeds; internal implementation improvement, no spec rule violated.
Adding authorizedDatabases option support (DRIVERS-685); new feature implementation per spec update, not existing nonconformance.
API ergonomics: adding String() methods to readpref types for logging convenience; no spec behavior involved.
ObjectID JSON unmarshaling API ergonomics: return zero value for empty string instead of error; user convenience, not spec requirement.
Non-addressable type pointer hook bug in BSON codec; Go reflect limitation/implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Adding commitQuorum option for createIndexes (DRIVERS-966); new MongoDB 4.4 feature implementation, not existing nonconformance.
CSFLE spec requires change streams to execute client-side encryption flow; driver skips encryption for change streams.
Sessions spec requires $clusterTime to be updated in handshakes/heartbeats; driver doesn't pass ClusterClock to topology layer.
API ergonomics: adding IsBatchEmpty/WouldNextBlock method to cursor; convenience improvement, not a spec conformance issue.
Adding hidden indexes support (DRIVERS-816); new MongoDB 4.4 feature implementation, not existing nonconformance.
CRUD spec changed: must raise error when hint used on any unacknowledged write; previous driver behavior only checked server version.
